message:
feat(text): Add Unicode BiDi support via feature-gated bidi module (bd-3ky.7)

Wraps unicode-bidi crate to provide reorder(), resolve_levels(),
has_rtl(), and paragraph_level() functions for mixed LTR/RTL text.
Feature-gated behind "bidi" flag. 26 tests including Hebrew, Arabic,
mixed-direction, and explicit directional marks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -8,6 +8,8 @@ publish = false
 default = []
 thread_local_cache = []
 markup = ["dep:ftui-render"]
+bidi = ["dep:unicode-bidi"]
+normalization = ["dep:unicode-normalization"]
 
 [dependencies]
 ftui-layout = { path = "../ftui-layout" }
@@ -20,6 +22,8 @@ tracing = "0.1"
 lru = "0.12"
 rustc-hash = "2"
 ropey = "1.6"
+unicode-bidi = { version = "0.3", optional = true }
+unicode-normalization = { version = "0.1", optional = true }
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 proptest = "1"
